channel.title: Comments on: Interview with Bob Cannon, Boston Brewery, Ep.57
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Dan
item.dc:creator: Dan
item.description: I agree with Mike that Bob Cannon is entertaining and comfortable on tv. I also agree with Mike that the topics and guests are great. But I completely disagree with Mike on the rest of his analysis of the interview. I want to thank John, Paul, and Michael Tesoro on the outstanding work they do. I find the show entertaining and educational. Beer America TV is definitely in a league of its own. Keep up the good work! I would love to see your show on tv sometime soon!
item.content:encoded: I agree with Mike that Bob Cannon is entertaining and comfortable on tv. I also agree with Mike that the topics and guests are great. But I completely disagree with Mike on the rest of his analysis of the interview. I want to thank John, Paul, and Michael Tesoro on the outstanding work they do. I find the show entertaining and educational. Beer America TV is definitely in a league of its own. Keep up the good work! I would love to see your show on tv sometime soon!

item.title: By: Bob Fernandez
item.dc:creator: Bob Fernandez
item.description: Nice.... Love watching this stuff. Just found you guys today and plan on diving into the site.
item.content:encoded: Nice…. Love watching this stuff. Just found you guys today and plan on diving into the site.

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Thanks for the comments Mike and Keith! We do our best with the amount of money we have (which is $0 :) My goals for the site are to be much more then the vlogs on beer tasting, but they will always be a part of the site. I think if you can see the beer with some fun and sometimes funny banter, it makes it more interesting then just reading about beers from bloggers. I've tried really hard to make these 5 minutes or less, but it's almost impossible, so we are doing our best to keep them 10 minutes or less. Having John Pinkerton, a working and successful brewmaster and a member of the BA board of directors, is invaluable and sets us a part from the other beer vlogging sites. Also having David Little, who works in the beer industry, is also a big bonus. As for me, I just try to moderate and keep the conversation going while asking questions that will hopefully educate the average craft beer drinker - like myself. Michael Tesoro is a partner in the site and fills in when he can to help the site. This has been a lot of fun, and having people like you guys, as well as all the other visitors to the site, keep us going, so comment away, both good and bad - we're doing this for you!
Paul Video BrewMaster
item.content:encoded:
Thanks for the comments Mike and Keith! We do our best with the amount of money we have (which is $0 🙂 My goals for the site are to be much more then the vlogs on beer tasting, but they will always be a part of the site. I think if you can see the beer with some fun and sometimes funny banter, it makes it more interesting then just reading about beers from bloggers. I’ve tried really hard to make these 5 minutes or less, but it’s almost impossible, so we are doing our best to keep them 10 minutes or less. Having John Pinkerton, a working and successful brewmaster and a member of the BA board of directors, is invaluable and sets us a part from the other beer vlogging sites. Also having David Little, who works in the beer industry, is also a big bonus. As for me, I just try to moderate and keep the conversation going while asking questions that will hopefully educate the average craft beer drinker – like myself. Michael Tesoro is a partner in the site and fills in when he can to help the site. This has been a lot of fun, and having people like you guys, as well as all the other visitors to the site, keep us going, so comment away, both good and bad – we’re doing this for you!

Paul
Video BrewMaster

item.title: By: Pedro
item.dc:creator: Pedro
item.description: That's not Paul in the video.

item.title: By: Keith
item.dc:creator: Keith
item.description: I disagree. I think John, and Paul do well and if you are interested in craft beer then there is not too much talking. I think the extra chatter is entertaining and can be informative. This video gives me hope that someday I can be a pro brewer or at least work for one. If you want plain beer reviews get some of the publications from the beverage institute. No fluff there just reviews. Keep up the good work!!
item.content:encoded: I disagree. I think John, and Paul do well and if you are interested in craft beer then there is not too much talking. I think the extra chatter is entertaining and can be informative. This video gives me hope that someday I can be a pro brewer or at least work for one. If you want plain beer reviews get some of the publications from the beverage institute. No fluff there just reviews. Keep up the good work!!

item.title: By: Mike
item.dc:creator: Mike
item.description:
Bob Cannon is entertaining and comfortable on tv... the other guys are not. and finally, a segment under 1hr... sorry, 7 minutes... hope you get the point. your topics and guests are great!, you talk too much though. Keep fighting the good fight.
Mike
item.content:encoded:
Bob Cannon is entertaining and comfortable on tv… the other guys are not. and finally, a segment under 1hr… sorry, 7 minutes… hope you get the point. your topics and guests are great!, you talk too much though. Keep fighting the good fight.

Mike
